Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests. Also, "V.I.P." interviews Lucy Brains and "Carol & Sis" finds Chris' interview complicated.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features another installment of "The Family", and Tim Conway's "World's Oldest Man".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Kaye Ballard & Steve Lawrence star. Featuring the movie spoof "Operation Minestrone" & "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Kaye Ballard, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Jack Weston and Michele Lee join for a sketch juxtaposing couples. Also: a doctor's visit is an emotional.
Video.title: Jack Weston, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Guest stars Bing Crosby and Paul Lynde take a trip to Canoga Falls in tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bing Crosby, Paul Lynde

Video.summary: Steve Martin and Betty White catch a wave in the movie spoof "Beach Blanket Boo-Boo!".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Steve Martin, Betty White

Video.summary: Frank Gorshin dazzles with his famous impressions, then joins up with Lana Turner in a sketch about Bluebeard.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Frank Gorshin, Lana Turner

Video.summary: Martha Raye guests, appearing in "Carol & Sis" as an Irish maid. Harvey fantasizes about being a matador.
Video.title: Martha Raye

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Rock Hudson spoof "The Murderer Always Rings Twice", and meet a decorator in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Sketches include an encounter at a bar between Harvey & Carol, and Carol & Vicki as "Lucky Lady" contestants.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones drop in to join in the fun!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: You get two Carols for the price of one when Carol Channing guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing

Video.summary: Paul Lynde and Nanette Fabray guest on the season finale, featuring an installment of "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Paul Lynde, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Rock Hudson stars, appearing with Carol as husband and wife anchors, and as secretary Mrs. Wiggins' date.
Video.title: Rock Hudson

Video.summary: Valerie Harper & Tim Conway guest! Valerie joins Carol on a date, and Tim is the world's oldest fireman.
Video.title: Valerie Harper, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway plays an airport guard. Carol & Harvey play actors suffering Carol's lack of contact lenses.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Nancy Wilson and Donald O'Connor star. Featuring a housewife plagued by ads and a spoof of "College Musical."
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Donald O'Connor

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters stars in a sketch about a woman introducing friends to each other. Also, an office visit.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry & Carl Reiner fly the funny skies in "Disaster '75!" And, one of Carol's classic sketches.
Video.title: Carl Reiner, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry performs "Mack The Knife", then joins Carol, Harvey, and Trini Lopez in a musical melodrama.
Video.title: Ken Berry, Trini Lopez

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters crashes Q&A. Sid Caesar teaches Carol self-defense, then joins the gang for a spoof.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters, Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Mel Torme returns! Mel discovers the greatest superstar behind the counter of a drugstore.
Video.title: Mel Torme

Video.summary: Clowning legend Emmett Kelly, a musical performance from The Jackson 5, and Carol in "A Swiped Life."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Emmett Kelly, Jackson Five

Video.summary: Maggie Smith stars as the teacher of Eunice and Bubba in "The Family." Also: a remodeled kitchen falls apart.
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Guests Steve Lawrence and Bernadette Peters each team up with Carol in another delightful night of comedy.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: The third season finale "Family Show" features the cast of regulars at their very best.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jim Nabors guests! Jim plays a chaperone. Carol and Harvey are majestic in a King Henry VIII sketch.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Funt & Mundane score a hit, leading to a performance. Also: Tim's "Oldest Man" character is completely at sea.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Paul Lynde guests as a real estate man. Also: The 10th Avenue Family & a performance from Carol's Charwoman.
Video.title: Paul Lynde

Video.summary: The season finale features the regular cast, highlighting Carol's performance as the girlfriend of a producer.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Mickey Rooney and John Davidson guest. Davidson sings, Rooney stars in a Western, and Carol must choose.
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Tim Conway guest, with Martha in a sketch about mothers, and Tim as "The Virgin Prince."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Dom DeLuise is Carol's guest for a night of sketched, including a murder investigation and "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Dick Van Dyke appears in a homage to Shirley Temple films, "Little Miss Showbiz", with Carol as Honey Bunny.
Video.title: Dick Van Dyke

Video.summary: Rock Hudson and Nancy Walker join for sketch set in the days of vaudeville, "When My Baby Laughs At Me."
Video.title: Rock Hudson, Nancy Walker

Video.summary: Tim Conway steals Carol's heart in a sketch about two shoppers, steals scenes as an extra, and steals a mint.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Jane Connell and Tim Conway star! Harvey & Tim are tipsy friends coming home. Also: The Arabian Nights spoof.
Video.title: Jane Connell, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Carol appears in a Late, Late Movie presentation of "A Swiped Life"-- take-off of "A Stolen Life."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest. Sketches include Carol as a princess and a look at the Safety Committee.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Step back in time with "The Family" as Eunice thinks back to her early days. Also, Tim plays a palace guard.
Video.title: Family Show
